name: Sensitive Virtual Machines Unavailable for a Long Period of Time
notes:
This rule triggers when a sensitive virtual machine has been stopped and is unavailable for a long period of time. 

Tune the rule by changing the down time for a sensitive virtual machine.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Started match in 1 hour(s) after BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Stopped match with the same Machine Identifier (custom)
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization, BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud
when any of Machine Identifier (custom) are contained in any of Sensitive Virtual Machines - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)

when none of BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Restarted, BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Started match in 1 hour(s) after BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Stopped match with the same Machine Identifier (custom)
TD_list: APPLY Sensitive Virtual Machines Unavailable for a Long Period of Time on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization, BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud
AND when any of Machine Identifier (custom) are contained in any of Sensitive Virtual Machines - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)

AND when none of BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Restarted, BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Started match in 1 hour(s) after BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Stopped match with the same Machine Identifier (custom)
RED_list: Event name: Sensitive Virtual Machines Unavailable for a Long Period of Time
Event description: Detects a sensitive virtual machine that has been stopped and is unavailable for a long period of time.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
